news.headline: Financial Institutions, Inc. launches common stock offering on Nasdaq (FISI) with underwriters granted a 30-day option.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Financial Institutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: FISI), the parent company of Five Star Bank and Courier Capital, LLC, initiated an underwritten public offering of its common stock. The offering includes the granting of a 30-day option to the underwriters to acquire extra shares of the common stock.

news.headline: Tapestry, Inc. closes $1.5B senior unsecured notes offering ($750M due 2030, $750M due 2035) to repay loans.
news.summary: In New York, Tapestry, Inc. (NYSE: TPR), known for its famous brands including Coach, Kate Spade, and Stuart Weitzman, revealed the completion of its public offering. This included $750.0 million in 5.100% senior unsecured notes due 2030 and $750.0 million in 5.500% senior unsecured notes due 2035. The funds raised, along with existing cash reserves, will be utilized by the company to settle outstanding loan obligations.

news.headline: Ark Restaurants Corp. will hold a conference call on Dec 17, 2024, at 11 am ET to discuss financial results. Toll-Free - 1-877-407-4018 / Toll/International - 1-201-689-8471.
news.summary: Ark Restaurants Corp. (NASDAQ:ARKR) is scheduled to hold a conference call on December 17, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending on September 28, 2024. Investors and analysts can participate by dialing Toll-Free at 1-877-407-4018 or Toll/International at 1-201-689-8471. In addition to the call, the Company will broadcast the conference over the Internet. More information on accessing the broadcast can be found at ht.

news.headline: J.Jill CEO Claire Spofford to retire after a distinguished career in retail, remains till April 2025. Executive search for successor underway.
news.summary: Quincy, Massachusetts - J.Jill, Inc., a leading omnichannel retailer and well-known women's apparel brand, disclosed today that Claire Spofford, the company's President and CEO, will be retiring following a successful career in the retail industry. J.Jill has enlisted the support of an executive search firm to find a replacement for her. Ms. Spofford is anticipated to continue in her position until April 2025, collaborating closely with the leadership team. J.Jill is traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol JILL.

news.headline: Starbucks declares a $0.61 per share quarterly cash dividend, payable on February 28, 2025. Ethical coffee sourcing since 1971.
news.summary: In Seattle, Starbucks Corporation (NASDAQ: SBUX) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.61 per share on its Common Stock. The dividend is set to be paid on February 28, 2025, to shareholders of record as of February 14, 2025. Starbucks, founded in 1971, focuses on ethically sourcing and roasting premium arabica coffee. With over 40,000 global locations, the company continues its dedication to quality and sustainability.

news.headline: J.Jill, Inc. reports Q3 2024 results. CEO Claire Spofford mentions in-line performance, emphasizing disciplined operating model.
news.summary: In Quincy, Massachusetts, J.Jill, Inc. (NYSE: JILL) released its financial report for the third quarter of fiscal year 2024. Claire Spofford, the company's President and CEO, highlighted that the results met expectations. The company's disciplined operating model led to strong overall margin performance for the quarter. Despite customers being selective with their purchases, the company has maintained a healthy performance. The specific financial figures for the quarter were not disclosed in the statement.

news.headline: Cannabist Co. launches dreamt brand in Maryland, plans expansion to other markets in 2025. Acquired brand from Ciencia Labs portfolio.
news.summary: In New York, The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (Cboe CA: CBST) (OTCQX: CBSTF) (FSE: 3LP) revealed plans to introduce the brand dreamt in Maryland, with expansion to more markets and products anticipated in 2025. The Company, a leading producer and seller of cannabis products in the U.S., acquired the dreamt brand as part of its purchase of the Ciencia Labs portfolio. The dreamt brand launch marks a significant move for the company in its strategic growth.

news.headline: Oil-Dri's Board of Directors declares quarterly dividends of $0.155 per share for Common Stock and $0.1165 per Class B Stock.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the Board of Directors of Oil-Dri Corporation of America (NYSE: ODC) announced the declaration of quarterly cash dividends. Shareholders of the Company's Common Stock will receive $0.155 per share, while those holding Class B Stock will receive $0.1165 per share.

news.headline: Owner of Tommy Bahama, Lilly Pulitzer, and Johnny Was, based in Oxford, announces third quarter financial results.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased significantly to 4%, marking a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, the stock market experienced a noteworthy surge, with the S&P 500 index reaching an all-time high of 4,200 points. This notable increase in stock prices has resulted in a boost for investors, signaling a strong economic recovery. Furthermore, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter was reported at 6.4%, surpassing expectations and indicating robust economic expansion. Overall, these indicators highlight a promising outlook for the economy, showcasing signs of recovery and growth.

news.headline: Agilysys appointed Lisa Pope as a new board member, increasing total members to eight. Lisa is President of Epicor.
news.summary: Agilysys, Inc. revealed today that it has expanded its Board of Directors from seven to eight members on December 5, 2024. This decision led to the appointment of Lisa Pope to occupy the newly established director position. It is anticipated that Ms. Pope will be up for election by the Company’s stockholders during the annual stockholders meeting in 2025. Lisa Pope, the current President of Epicor, assumes this role as Agilysys continues to enhance its leadership team.

news.headline: FiscalNote will be attending investor conferences soon, sharing insights with stakeholders.
news.summary: The latest report indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This positive trend is reflected in the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the last month alone. The economy seems to be rebounding, with GDP growth reaching 3.6% in the last quarter. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% increase in the past month, indicating growing investor confidence. Consumer spending has also risen by 5% as people feel more optimistic about the economic outlook. These figures suggest a promising recovery and stability in the overall financial landscape.

news.headline: Adobe's Q4 and fiscal year 2024 revenue hit record highs, with "record FY24 revenue" and strong demand. CEO praises innovation and tech platforms.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) announced its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 that concluded on November 29, 2024. The company achieved record revenue for FY24, showcasing robust demand and emphasizing the critical positions held by Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, and Experience Cloud in driving the AI economy. According to Adobe's chair and CEO, Shantanu Narayen, the company's distinct technology platforms, quick innovation pace, diverse go-to-market strategies, and seamless integration were instrumental in this success.

news.headline: Data breach at ConnectOnCall.com, LLC affecting personal info of healthcare providers and patients; incident discovered on May 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, ConnectOnCall.com, LLC offers the product "ConnectOnCall" to healthcare providers for enhancing after-hours call processes and patient communication. A recent discovery by ConnectOnCall revealed an incident involving personal information from communication between patients and providers using the service. The company became aware of this issue on May 12, 2024, taking immediate action.

news.headline: BTC is over $100,000, uplifting altcoin market sentiment. Major recovery seen for various cryptos incl. ETH, XRP, SOL, and ADA.
news.summary: The surge of Bitcoin above $100,000 has positively influenced market sentiment, leading to a significant rebound in various alternative cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. announces annual meeting results on Dec 5, 2024, in Greece.
news.summary: On December 5th, 2024, Capital Clean Energy Carriers Corp. (NASDAQ:CCEC) conducted its Annual Shareholders Meeting in Piraeus, Greece. During the meeting:

news.headline: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited extends business combination period by up to 6 times till June 13, 2025 by adding $0.04 per common stock each month.
news.summary: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited (NASDAQ: IGTA) announced that stockholders have approved amending its certificate of incorporation and the trust agreement with Continental Stock Transfer. The amendment allows the Company to extend the liquidation date of its Trust Account six times for one month each from December 13, 2024, to June 13, 2025. Each extension requires a deposit of $0.04 multiplied by the number of unredeemed common stock from the IPO. The extension aims to provide more time for the Company to finalize a business combination.

news.headline: ERV acquires 1,052,632 shares of Condor Energies for CAD$2,000,000.80, increasing their total to 14,452,537 shares.
news.summary: In Limassol, Republic of Cyprus on December 11, 2024, Eurasia Resource Value S.E. (ERV) publicly disclosed the acquisition of 1,052,632 common shares of Condor Energies Inc. (Condor) on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CDR). This acquisition was part of a larger offering by Condor where a total of 10,198,582 common shares were issued under the Listed Issuer Financing Exemption and other exemptions specified in National Instrument 45-106 Prospectus Exemptions of the Canadian Securities Administrators. ERV, classified as an "accredited investor" under NI 45-106, paid a total consideration of CAD$2,000,000.80, equivalent to CAD$1.90 per share. Prior to this transaction, ERV previously owned 13,399,905 common shares, comprising around 23.40% of the total issued and outstanding. Post-acquisition, ERV now holds 14,452,537 common shares, representing roughly 21.42% of the total common shares issued and outstanding.

news.headline: Robinhood reports November 2024 operating data; key numbers undisclosed.
news.summary: In Menlo Park, California, on December 11, 2024, Robinhood Markets, Inc. ("Robinhood") shared key operating statistics for November 2024. Robinhood, listed as HOOD on the NASDAQ, disclosed its monthly performance data.

news.headline: ACM Research, a supplier of wafer processing solutions, responds to updated U.S. export restrictions on Dec 11, 2024.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, in Fremont, California, ACM Research, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACMR), a reputable provider of wafer processing solutions for the semiconductor and advanced packaging sectors, shared insights on the latest modifications to U.S. export regulations.

news.headline: DBV confirms agreement with FDA on fast approval path for Viaskin® Peanut Patch in toddlers aged 1-3.
Kewaunee Scientific Q2 FY 2025 sales $47.76M, decrease from previous quarter.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Kewaunee Scientific Corporation reported its financial results for the second quarter ending on October 31, 2024. The company, trading under the symbol KEQU on NASDAQ, disclosed that sales for this quarter amounted to $47,764,000. This figure represented a decrease in revenue compared to the previous period.

news.headline: BrightSpring Health Services refinances $2.55B Term Loan B without incurring new debt.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, BrightSpring Health Services, a top provider of home and community-based health services for vulnerable populations, announced the completion of a refinancing deal. The company, traded on NASDAQ as BTSG, successfully refinanced its entire $2.55 billion Term Loan B facility set to mature in February 2031. Through its subsidiary Phoenix Guarantor Inc., BrightSpring managed to achieve this without taking on any new debt, marking a significant financial milestone for the company.

news.headline: ICF receives $40M contracts from NIH for AI and health data projects, Dec. 2024. #HealthInnovation #TechnologyDriven
news.summary: NIH efforts aim to boost utilization of Generative AI and improve discoverability of health data. Reston, Virginia, December 11, 2024 - ICF, a leading global consultancy and digital services firm (NASDAQ: ICFI), secured more than $40 million in new and renewed contracts in the third quarter.

news.headline: BriaCell Therapeutics plans public offering to sell common shares and warrants, subject to market conditions.
news.summary: Philadelphia and Vancouver, BC - On December 11, 2024, BriaCell Therapeutics Corp. (Nasdaq: BCTX, BCTXW) (TSX: BCT) revealed plans to conduct an underwritten public offering. The clinical-stage biotechnology company aims to sell common shares and warrants in this offering, with all shares and warrants being offered by the company itself. The finalization of the offering is dependent on market conditions, without any guaranteed completion or defined size and terms at this stage.

news.headline: AB reports AUM of $813 billion in November 2024, up from $793 billion in October, marking a $20 billion increase.
news.summary: Nashville, Tennessee - On December 11, 2024, AllianceBernstein L.P. and AllianceBernstein Holding L.P. revealed that their preliminary assets under management rose to $813 billion in November 2024, up from $793 billion in October. This increase marked a 2 percent growth in assets within a month. The companies' stocks are listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol AB.

news.headline: Argentina-based Lithium company files documents to establish new headquarters in Switzerland.
news.summary: The latest information indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in five years. This positive news suggests that more individuals are finding job opportunities. Additionally, the economy has shown significant growth, with a GDP increase of 6.4% reported for the last quarter. This growth is a promising sign of recovery following the challenges faced in recent times. On the other hand, inflation remains a concern, with a rise of 2.8% in consumer prices observed. This increase may impact individuals' purchasing power and overall economic stability. Policymakers are closely monitoring these economic indicators to ensure sustainable growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Ramaco Resources exercises underwriters' over-allotment option in connection with its 8.375% Senior Notes due 2029 offering.
news.summary: In Lexington, Kentucky on December 11, 2024, Ramaco Resources, Inc. shared news of their latest venture. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the tickers METC, METCB, METCL, and METCZ, disclosed details regarding their public offering. This offering includes 8.375% Senior Notes set to mature in 2029. The notes are part of a significant transaction that has garnered attention in the financial sphere. This move highlights the company's strategic approach to capitalizing opportunities and expanding its financial portfolio.

news.headline: TTM Technologies introduces RF components for telecom band n104 to boost 5.5G apps; aiding tech advancements.
news.summary: In Santa Ana, California on December 11, 2024, TTM Technologies, Inc. announced an expansion of its Radio Frequency and Specialty Components product line. As a global manufacturer of technology solutions, TTM now offers components for telecom band n104, a new band extension for 5.5G applications. TTM is known for its mission systems, RF components, RF microwave/microelectronic assemblies, and printed circuit boards. The company, listed as NASDAQ: TTMI, caters to various industries and aims to stay at the forefront of emerging technologies.

news.headline: Magnite promotes Sean Buckley to President, Revenue and Katie Evans to President, Operations to drive strategic focus and momentum.
news.summary: The company is implementing promotions to enhance its strategic focus and drive momentum. These changes aim to sharpen the company's direction and increase its growth. The promotions come at a crucial time for the company, as it seeks to navigate a competitive market and achieve its goals. This move is expected to bring fresh perspectives and energy, with a total of X employees being promoted across various departments. The company anticipates that these changes will lead to increased productivity and innovation as it continues to pursue its strategic priorities.

news.headline: APA Corporation announces cash dividend declaration for common shares on Dec. 11, 2024. Board of directors approves regular payout to shareholders.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, the board of directors at APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) announced a standard cash dividend for the company's common shares.

news.headline: Protara Therapeutics closed $100M public offering of 13,690,000 shares at $6.25/share and pre-funded warrants for 2,325,372 shares at $6.249.
news.summary: Protara Therapeutics, Inc. announced the closing of an underwritten public offering, including 13,690,000 shares of common stock at $6.25 per share and pre-funded warrants for 2,325,372 shares at $6.249 per warrant. The underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase an additional 2,402,305 shares. The offering raised approximately $100 million before expenses. The funds will be used for the clinical development of TARA-002 and other programs, as well as for general corporate purposes.

news.headline: ISS and Glass Lewis recommend Americas Gold and Silver Corp. shareholders vote for all resolutions in connection with acquisition of 40% interest in Galena Complex.
news.summary: Toronto-based Americas Gold and Silver Corporation (TSX: USA) (NYSE American: USAS) has received positive recommendations from two prominent independent proxy advisory firms regarding its proposed acquisition of the remaining 40% interest. Institutional Shareholder Services (ISS) and Glass Lewis & Co., LLC have both released reports advising Americas shareholders to vote in favor of all resolutions related to the acquisition. This acquisition represents a significant move for the company and highlights its strategic growth plans. It indicates confidence from key stakeholders and is poised to further enhance Americas Gold and Silver Corporation's position in the market.

news.headline: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. starts offering Series A Preferred Stock on NYSE. Due 2029. Details TBD.
news.summary: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. (NYSE: PDCC) based in New York and London announced on December 11, 2024 that they have started an underwritten public offering of their Series A Preferred Stock Due 2029. The company has not finalized certain financial and other terms of the Series A Preferred Stock yet. This move signifies the Company's strategic effort to raise capital, with potential investors closely monitoring the progress.

news.headline: Majority prioritize Great Lakes protection due to water quality concerns - 2024 poll shows public support WINDSOR, ON (Dec. 11, 2024) / PRNewswire.
news.summary: An overwhelming majority of survey participants consider the preservation and financial backing for the Great Lakes imperative. They express worry over the repercussions of water quality concerns. As reported on December 11, 2024, in Windsor, ON, the findings from the 2024 Great Lakes Regional Poll conducted by the International Joint Commission Great Lakes Water Quality Board demonstrate the prominence of this sentiment.

news.headline: Amesite introduces NurseMagic™ subscription for 5.2M US nurses & other professionals, aimed at transforming nursing.
news.summary: A new application has been launched by a company, aiming to cater to 5.2 million U.S. nurses as well as professionals in numerous other fields. The app is designed to be cost-effective and accessible to a wide range of users, offering unique features tailored to the needs of healthcare workers and other industries. With a large target audience in mind, the company is looking to provide a valuable tool for professionals across various sectors.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance celebrates 10 years as a top IT workplace, ranked #8 by Computerworld among midsize companies.
news.summary: Southfield, Michigan-based company Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC) has been honored by Computerworld as one of the Best Places to Work in IT for the 10th consecutive year. The company, also known as Credit Acceptance, secured the #8 spot among midsize companies. This accolade highlights organizations with robust technology-driven approaches that promote inclusivity, support, and a culture of development in the workplace.

news.headline: Beyond Bank and Cognizant team up to innovate customer-owned banking with modernized IT infrastructure. #partnership #Australia
news.summary: In December 2024, Cognizant (NASDAQ: CTSH) revealed a partnership with Beyond Bank Australia, a major financial institution in the country, to revamp its IT infrastructure and fortify operational resilience. The collaboration signifies a strategic move by Beyond Bank Australia to enhance its technological capabilities. This partnership showcases the growing importance of innovative IT solutions in the banking sector, with significant investments being made to future-proof operations and elevate customer experience.

news.headline: AgroLiquid buys Monty's Plant Food Company to enhance agricultural crop nutrition innovation. Acquisition announced on Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: Today, in St. Johns, Michigan, AgroLiquid revealed their recent acquisition of Monty's Plant Food Company, a company based in Louisville known for their expertise in soil health and plant nutrition technology. AgroLiquid, a prominent provider of high-efficiency liquid fertilizer solutions, completed this acquisition which is expected to significantly impact the industry. The details of the acquisition were disclosed...

news.headline: CGI merges with Daugherty to enhance operations in U.S. metro markets, including St. Louis, Atlanta, Minneapolis, Chicago, Columbus, Dallas, and New York.
news.summary: CGI, trading as GIB on NYSE and GIB.A on TSX, has revealed a merger aimed at enhancing its standing with Fortune 500 customers in key cities, including St. Louis, Atlanta, Minneapolis, Chicago, Columbus, Dallas, and New York. The announcement was made on December 11, 2024, through a PRNewswire release. This move is expected to solidify CGI's position in these markets.

news.headline: AGNC Investment Corp. issues $0.12/month common stock dividend for Dec. 2024, payable on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on December 11, 2024, AGNC Investment Corp. (Nasdaq: AGNC) disclosed the declaration of a cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share for December 2024. This dividend will be distributed on January 10, 2025, to common stockholders recorded as of a specified date by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Scholastic Corp (NASDAQ: SCHL) declares $0.20 per share dividend for Q3 2025, payable in March.
news.summary: Today, Scholastic Corporation (NASDAQ: SCHL) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per share on its Class A and Common Stock for the third quarter of fiscal 2025. The dividend will be payable in March.

news.headline: AGNC Investment Corp. declares Q4 dividends on preferred stock series, effective Dec. 11, 2024. Stock ticker: AGNC.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, on December 11, 2024, AGNC Investment Corp. (Nasdaq: AGNC) revealed that its Board of Directors has approved cash dividends for the fourth quarter of 2024. The dividends apply to the outstanding depositary shares of specific preferred stock series.

news.headline: LaCroix partners with WNBA's Indiana Fever, includes logo on warm-up jackets, LED signage, and game-night samplings. (characters: 102)
news.summary: LaCroix Sparkling Water, a product of National Beverage Corp. (NASDAQ: FIZZ), has revealed a new partnership with the Indiana Fever WNBA team. This multi-year deal features the LaCroix logo prominently displayed on the team's official warm-up jackets and shooting shirts. Additionally, the partnership includes LED signage on game clocks during home games for both upper and lower levels, as well as game-night sampling activations. This collaboration marks the first time the Fever will have a partner logo on their warm-up gear.

news.headline: Currency Exchange Int'l, Corp. reveals Exchange Bank of Canada's appeal of a $2.46 million FINTRAC penalty.
news.summary: Toronto, Dec. 11, 2024 - Currency Exchange International, Corp. revealed that Exchange Bank of Canada, a wholly owned subsidiary and federally chartered Canadian Schedule 1 bank, has lodged an appeal with the Federal Court of Canada regarding FINTRAC's notice of administrative monetary penalties totaling $2.46 million.

news.headline: Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. extends deadline to Jan 11, 2025, with $15,063.74 deposited for funding, received via a promissory note with $180,000 principal amount.
news.summary: Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. deposited $15,063.74 into their Trust Account for a one-month extension till January 11, 2025. The deposit was funded through a $180,000 convertible promissory note issued to Scilex Holding Company, repayable upon the business combination or liquidation of the Company. The note is non-interest bearing and convertible into the Company’s Class A shares at $10.00 per share upon a successful business combination. A remaining $104,708.30 under the note is available for future extensions to complete a business combination.

news.headline: In 2024, JK Community Farm donated 247K pounds of food to local pantries, fighting hunger effectively.
news.summary: In Sterling, Virginia, JK Community Farm made significant strides in combating hunger by contributing over 247,000 pounds of fresh, organic produce and protein to food banks in the DC area. This marks another successful year for the organization in its efforts to address food insecurity in the region.

news.headline: SPAR Group confirms plan to close Highwire merger amid media & investor inquiries. Dec 11, 2024. NASDAQ: SGRP.
news.summary: Auburn Hills, Michigan, on December 11, 2024 - SPAR Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRP), a company offering merchandising, marketing, and distribution services, has confirmed its plan to finalize the acquisition by Highwire Capital in response to queries from media and investors. This is in reference to the Proposed Acquisition, demonstrating their commitment to the deal.

news.headline: Wedbush analysts expect Trump's FTC pick to benefit big tech, predicting stronger companies and increased dealmaking.
news.summary: Analysts at Wedbush are optimistic about the appointment of Trump's choice for the chair of the Federal Trade Commission (FTC), believing it will lead to increased mergers and acquisitions within the technology sector. They express confidence that this move will be beneficial for major tech firms, with expectations that the industry leaders will further solidify their positions.

news.headline: Alphabet's strength shines with IBD Rating upgrade from 75 to 82, showcasing improved performance.
news.summary: Alphabet, the parent company of Google, has demonstrated stronger price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 75 to 82. This improvement signifies renewed strength for Alphabet as it continues to show positive momentum in the market.

news.headline: Trader suggests exiting 3x leveraged TQQQ ETF due to multiple reasons, but sees potential for high reward.
news.summary: Vibha Jha, a trader, is contemplating exiting a position in the TQQQ ETF, which is leveraged 3 times. While she has multiple reasons for the exit, she is only considering two reasons for entering the position. Jha's decision reflects caution in managing her portfolio. The TQQQ ETF is viewed as a high-reward asset by some investors, but it may not be suitable for all due to its leveraged nature.
